description: Tristan from Zeta presents insights on maximizing success in hackathons, sharing experiences from their journey in building a DeFi options platform on Solana. The session covers tips on project development, deployment, and presentation strategies to help participants excel in hackathons.
topic_summary: Tristan discusses strategies for succeeding in hackathons, including project development, community building, and effective presentations, drawing from Zeta's experience in the previous hackathon [t=66.3].
